questions.question: Why is using block hashes for randomness insecure?
options: Block hashes are too short to provide enough entropy
Miners can see block hashes before finalizing blocks and refuse to publish unfavorable ones
Block hashes are deterministic and always produce the same value
Block hashes can only be accessed by contract owners
questions.correctAnswer: Miners can see block hashes before finalizing blocks and refuse to publish unfavorable ones

questions.question: In dcipher's threshold randomness, the threshold signature itself IS the random value, not derived from it.
options: True
False

questions.question: What makes threshold randomness more secure than a centralized oracle?
options: It's faster to compute
It costs less to operate
An attacker must compromise multiple independent nodes meeting the threshold, not just one service
It doesn't require any cryptography
questions.correctAnswer: An attacker must compromise multiple independent nodes meeting the threshold, not just one service

questions.question: The randomness request-callback process is ______, meaning your transaction finishes immediately and randomness arrives later.
options: asynchronous
synchronous
sequential
parallel

questions.question: What happens when dcipher operators generate randomness?
options: One operator generates the random value and broadcasts it to others
Each operator contributes entropy through MPC protocols to collectively generate a value no single operator could predict
The smart contract generates the randomness and operators verify it
Operators vote on which random number to use
questions.correctAnswer: Each operator contributes entropy through MPC protocols to collectively generate a value no single operator could predict

questions.question: When your onRandomnessReceived() callback executes, the randomness has already been cryptographically verified by the base contract.
options: True
False

questions.question: What does the callbackGasLimit parameter specify?
options: The maximum gas price you're willing to pay
How much gas to allocate for the callback transaction when dcipher fulfills your request
The total gas limit for the entire randomness request
The minimum gas required to deploy the contract
questions.correctAnswer: How much gas to allocate for the callback transaction when dcipher fulfills your request
